escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext command fails twice on the same item after one Composer fix attempt
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or pickup/delivery CF eligibility logic (run Sonnet 4.6 security review Task before push)
item tier is T2+ and changes auth, Firestore writes, or transaction/idempotency behavior
acceptance criteria cannot be met without schema or rules change not listed in item scope — mark blocked, do not widen scope
executionProtocol.instructions: Follow PROJECT_STATUS/AWAY_BUILD_PROTOCOL.md. After each item: npm run away:ship -- --id <id> --note "..." then npm run away:validate.

queue.title: Phase 5: fingerprint dedup in getProposedEmailUpdates
queue.scope: In src/dispatcher/email/getProposedEmailUpdates.ts, record content fingerprints in existing.byFingerprint after each non-duplicate fixture (mirror test-email-parser.mjs index pattern) so msg-duplicate-004 and similar content-duplicates are excluded from the Proposed Email panel. Update scripts/test-email-parser.mjs to set byFingerprint in the processing loop and assert fingerprint duplicate detection. No Firestore, no CF, no live inbox.
queue.acceptance: getProposedEmailUpdates excludes content-duplicates (msg-duplicate-004 not in proposals); npm run test:email-parser PASS with fingerprint duplicate assertion; npm run build clean; npm run verify:dispatcher-nav PASS.

queue.title: Phase 5: verify:phase5-email interactive harness
queue.scope: Add scripts/verify-phase5-email.mjs — Playwright with auth on dispatcher Proposed Email Updates panel: click All / Needs review / Low confidence filters and expand a row to assert detail row visible. Add npm run verify:phase5-email in package.json. No UI component changes unless testids missing.
queue.acceptance: npm run verify:phase5-email PASS (filter clicks + row expand); npm run build clean.

queue.acceptance: msg-correction-015 classified correction_to_earlier_email with humanReviewRequired; npm run test:email-parser aggregate ≥95%; npm run build clean.
